improvements: Clippy now notices the moment background sync stops — even while you're looking at the app — and brings it back on its own
A big backlog of clips now syncs in batches instead of all at once, so a long offline stretch can't overwhelm the app
fixes: Fixed a long copy sometimes syncing cut off halfway
Fixed screenshots and copies being lost when they were captured just as another clip arrived
Clips no longer sync twice when two syncs start at the same moment
A screenshot that failed to read once is now retried instead of skipped for good
